title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm out with Narita Brian...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huh, plushies... Reminds me a bit of the old days.

I follow Narita Brian's gaze to a claw machine
filled with Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I had a plushie like that when I was little. ...My big
sis and I used to have matching ones.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Not in plushies, and certainly not in claw
machines.
choice_data_list:
Claw machines are more complex than they
seem.

Claw machines are more complex than they
seem.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...How so? It's just a game, right?
choice_data_list: You need to have a keen sense of timing.
You need to have a keen sense of timing.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Oh? Then show me. Let's see what this claw
machine thing is all about.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm taking the trouble to watch, so don't waste my
time with anything but your best.
There's no way I can fail now!
